entries.label: Integer conversions
entries.note: Widening is always safe; narrowing and sign changes may lose data

entries.label: Float conversions
entries.note: Float-to-int truncates toward zero; saturates at bounds

entries.label: Bool and char
entries.code:
let b = true as u8;    // 1
let c = 'A' as u32;    // 65
let c = 65u8 as char;  // 'A'
entries.note: bool converts to 0/1; char to/from its Unicode code point

entries.label: usize for indexing
entries.note: Array/Vec indices must be usize; use as usize to convert

entries.label: From trait
entries.note: Infallible conversion; implement From to define type conversions

entries.label: Into trait
entries.note: Into is the reciprocal of From; implement From and get Into for free

entries.label: Custom From
entries.note: Define conversions between your own types

entries.label: From for error types
entries.note: Implement From to enable ? operator error conversion

entries.label: From<&str> for String
entries.note: Multiple ways to convert &str to String; all equivalent

entries.label: Fallible conversion
entries.note: Returns Result instead of silently truncating; safer than as

entries.label: TryInto
entries.note: Reciprocal of TryFrom; implement TryFrom and get TryInto free

entries.label: Custom TryFrom
entries.note: Validate during conversion; reject invalid inputs

entries.label: TryFrom with ?
entries.note: Combines naturally with ? operator for error propagation

entries.label: to_string
entries.code:
let s = 42.to_string();       // "42"
let s = 3.14.to_string();     // "3.14"
let s = true.to_string();     // "true"
let s = 'A'.to_string();      // "A"
entries.note: Available on all types that implement Display

entries.label: parse / FromStr
entries.note: parse() works for any type implementing FromStr; turbofish or type annotation required

entries.label: Custom FromStr
entries.note: Implement FromStr to make your types parseable from strings

entries.label: Display for custom types
entries.note: Implementing Display gives you to_string() and {} formatting for free

entries.label: AsRef for borrowing
entries.note: Generic function accepting multiple types that can be viewed as &T

entries.label: AsRef<str>
entries.note: Accept &str, String, and &String with one parameter type

entries.label: AsRef<Path>
entries.note: Standard library functions use AsRef<Path> to accept &str, String, Path, PathBuf

entries.label: Automatic coercion
entries.note: Rust follows the Deref chain automatically in function calls

entries.label: Common coercions
entries.note: Smart pointers and containers auto-deref to their inner type

entries.label: Custom Deref
entries.note: Implement Deref to enable auto-dereferencing for your types

entries.label: Borrow trait
entries.note: Borrow allows looking up owned keys with borrowed equivalents

entries.label: ToOwned trait
entries.note: Generalized clone: &str -> String, &[T] -> Vec<T>, &Path -> PathBuf

entries.label: Cow (Clone on Write)
entries.note: Delay allocation until mutation is needed; borrow when possible

entries.label: Safe widening
entries.note: Use From for infallible widening conversions

entries.label: Checked narrowing
entries.note: Use TryFrom for conversions that might not fit

entries.label: When to use which
entries.note: Prefer From > TryFrom > as for type safety
